source.section: 2.2 - Air-to-Ground Modes > 2.2.2 - MAP (Ground Mapping) Mode > How to Select Map Mode

steps.action: Make sure the Radar Power Switch is set to OPR (Operate).
steps.voiced: Set Radar Power Switch to OPR.

steps.action: Pressing the A/G Master Mode button will set the right DDI (Digital Display Indicator) to the radar A-G MAP page.
steps.voiced: Press the A/G Master Mode button to bring up the radar MAP page on the right DDI.

steps.action: Alternatively, you could also select the RDR ATTK (Radar) TAC page, and press the OSB (Option Select Button) next to SURF (Air-to- Surface). The radar page will then switch from air-to-air to air-to-ground. This method works too, but it is longer than just pressing the A/G Master Mode button.
steps.voiced: Alternatively, select the RDR ATTK TAC page and press the OSB next to SURF — slower than the Master Mode button but it works.
